notes.en: Casting [[ability:burst]] regenerates a total of 6 Energy for each of your party member. This set reduces your Energy Requirements by a bit for all of your party members, which can be quite beneficial. Do note that this is a 4 star set so you're potentially missing out on 5 star stat scaling, which is a 34% difference in Main Stat value and 25% difference in individual substat value.

The effectiveness of this set increases if you've already met the [[stat:er]] requirement for [[character:gorou]]. At that point, you'd no longer need to run the recommended [[stat:er]] sets, which means you can opt for this instead.

note.en: This is a set [[character:gorou]] may run when used in a [[element:lunar-crystallize]] team, notably when paired with [[character:zibai]]. Because this is a 4-star set, you're losing out on 5-star stat scaling. It is recommended to run an offpiece 5-star sands while running this set.
Can be used when [[character:gorou]] is paired with [[character:columbina]] or [[character:zibai]] so that other units can run more beneficial artifact sets.
